text:
ing.
Leo:—He will be dignified, prosperous or respectable, with
a broad face, intelligent, virtuous, enjoyer of pleasures, deceit-
ful, of charming face, merciful, fearless, getting angry for trifles
for a long time, emaciated by hunger, endowed with innate
strength, very rich, obedient to his mother, adhering strictly
to his principles, valiant, living alone, not firm and having not
many sons. He has reddish eyes.

RASI EFFECTS 83
Virgo:—He is slovenly, with very little wealth and happiness,
wise, religious-minded, hater of relatives, of phlegm and wind
in constitution, with many daughters and few sons, of lovely
face, liked hy damsels, fickle, learned, long-lived, of sweet speech,
intent on money, of peaceful end and taking delight in others'
prosperity.
Libra:—He will be virtuous, religious-minded, with a magna-
nimous heart, a smiling face, having wife, troubles, clever
in trade, fond of mirth, full of knowledge, helping relatives,
